h1.visual_description: Not present in this sample; likely large, bold, centered or left-aligned serif font.

h2.visual_description: Not present in this sample; likely medium-sized bold serif font.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure source or in-text citation, often styled as a blue hyperlink.
Footnote entry located at the bottom of the page, set in a smaller font size than body text.
Page footer containing the publication title in all-caps followed by the page number.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: Standard LaTeX for inline and block equations.
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Author-date parenthetical citations (e.g., Author and Author Year).

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Uppercase running footer at the bottom right containing the book title and page number (e.g., 'BEHAVIORAL ECONOMICS PRACTICUM 111').
